params.name: Chacmool Statue
params.description: The Chacmool statue is a type of sculpture originating from ancient Mesoamerica, primarily associated with the Toltec culture. The discovery and study of Chacmool statues provide important clues for understanding ancient Mesoamerican culture and religious practices. Chacmool statues typically depict a human figure lying down, with the upper body raised, knees bent, head turned to one side, and hands placed on the abdomen forming a container-like space. This posture is believed to be related to s …
